title: Find Second Largest Element
problemStatement: Given an array of integers, write a function `findSecondLargest(arr)` to return the second largest element in the array. If no such element exists, return -1.
constraints:
Time: O(N)
Space: O(1)
Array size N >= 2

title: Longest Subarray with Sum K
problemStatement: Given an array `arr` and a target sum `k`, write a function `longestSubarray(arr, k)` that returns the length of the longest subarray whose elements sum up to `k`.

title: Merge Intervals
problemStatement: Given an array of intervals where intervals[i] = [start, end], merge all overlapping intervals, and return an array of the non-overlapping intervals that cover all the input intervals. Write function `mergeIntervals(intervals)`.
constraints:
Time: O(N log N)
Space: O(N)

title: Valid Parentheses
problemStatement: Given a string `s` containing just the characters '(', ')', '{', '}', '[' and ']', write a function `isValid(s)` to determine if the input string is valid. An input string is valid if open brackets are closed by the same type of brackets and closed in the correct order.

title: Container With Most Water
problemStatement: Given `n` non-negative integers `height` where each represents a point at coordinate (i, height[i]). `n` vertical lines are drawn such that the two endpoints of line i is at (i, height[i]) and (i, 0). Find two lines, which together with x-axis forms a container, such that the container contains the most water. Return the max area using `maxArea(height)`.

title: Trapping Rain Water
problemStatement: Given `n` non-negative integers representing an elevation map where the width of each bar is 1, compute how much water it can trap after raining. Write function `trap(height)`.
constraints:
Time: O(N)
Space: O(1) or O(N)

title: Find Duplicate Number
problemStatement: Given an array of integers `nums` containing `n + 1` integers where each integer is in the range `[1, n]` inclusive. There is only one duplicate number in `nums`, find the duplicate number using `findDuplicate(nums)`.
constraints:
Time: O(N)
Space: O(1) (without modifying array) or O(N)

title: Search in Rotated Sorted Array
problemStatement: There is an integer array `nums` sorted in ascending order (with distinct values). Prior to being passed to your function, `nums` is possibly rotated at an unknown pivot index. Given the array `nums` after the possible rotation and an integer `target`, return the index of `target` if it is in `nums`, or -1 if it is not in `nums`. Write function `searchRotated(nums, target)`.

title: Median of Two Sorted Arrays
problemStatement: Given two sorted arrays `nums1` and `nums2` of size `m` and `n` respectively, return the median of the two sorted arrays. Write function `findMedianSortedArrays(nums1, nums2)`.
constraints:
Time: O(log(m+n))
Space: O(1) or O(m+n)

title: Reverse Words in String
problemStatement: Given an input string `s`, reverse the order of the words. A word is defined as a sequence of non-space characters. The words in `s` will be separated by at least one space. Return a string of the words in reverse order concatenated by a single space using `reverseWords(s)`.

title: Kth Largest Element
problemStatement: Given an integer array `nums` and an integer `k`, return the `k`-th largest element in the array. Note that it is the `k`-th largest element in the sorted order, not the `k`-th distinct element. Write function `findKthLargest(nums, k)`.

title: Longest Consecutive Sequence
problemStatement: Given an unsorted array of integers `nums`, return the length of the longest consecutive elements sequence. Write function `longestConsecutive(nums)`.
